titleStmt.title: SII 40.62: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 62. (A.R. No. B. 40 of 1930.) Gāmālapāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up behind the Chennakēśava temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1599, Naḷa, Kārttīka śu. 10.

Records the construction of a quadrangular platform (chautara), tower and the installation of a Garuḍa-pillar, Bell and a Kettle drum (bhēri) in the temple of Rājagō[pā]lasvāmi at Gāmulapāḍu and consecration of the images of Narasiṁha and Garuḍa by Bollā-Nārasiṁha for the merit of his parents Gaṅgama and Chennama Nēdu of Recherla-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁ
bbulu 1599 yagunēṭi nalanāma saṁvvatsa
ra kā¨rtika śu 10 lu rece¨rla gōtrōdbha
vulunnu timmanaṁgāri pautrulunnu cennama
nēni putṛlunnu Ayina bollā nāraśiṁhva
ḍu śrīgāmulapāṭi rājagōpālasvāmiki kai
ṁkkaryaśiddhigānu cautaragaṭṭiṁcci garuḍa gaṁbhaṁ
yettiṁcci Aṁddu nṛśiṁhvamū¨rttini śeyiṁcci
Amīdaṭa śikaraṁ gaṭṭiṁcci Aṁddu mīṁda garu
ḍāḷluvāri nilpi ghaṁṭṭalu veyiṁcci svāmiki
sama¨rpaṇagā tamatalli gaṁggamagārikini ta
ma taṁḍri caṁnnamanēnikini puṇyamugānu
sakala saṁbhramōtsavāla cētanunnu nilipi ma
rinni hanumaṁttuniki dakṣaṇabhāgāna nā
gulanunnu yiśvaruni devaḷaṁ tu¨rpubhāgā
na birinēnininni nilipi pratiṣṭha śeyiṁcce ga
naka Ācaṁdra¨rkasthāIgā voppenu

svadattaṁ paradāttaṁ vā yō harēte vasuṁdharā .
saṣṭivva¨rṣa sahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭātāṁ jāyatē krimi .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattaṁ
pratipālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa
svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 40.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
